introSection: Kiddie Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Family Kingdom Amusement Park in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.
fullText: Kiddie Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Family Kingdom Amusement Park in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.
